ground_truth.title: TurboTax Expert Full Service | Get a Tax Expert to File Your Taxes
ground_truth.main_content:
Limited-time offer
An expert files for you. $150, all in.
Includes all tax situations. Applies if a TurboTax expert didn't file for you last year. File by 2/28. Offer details
Meet with a local expert in person or online
Whether your expert files for you in person or online, they’ll get every tax break you deserve and your taxes done 100% right—guaranteed.
Work with your perfect tax match every year
Once you’ve found a tax expert who understands your needs, you’ll never have to start over. Year after year, you can have your same trusted expert file for you.
Unlimited expert help
Get unlimited tax help whenever you need it. Our experts are standing by, even on nights and weekends during tax season.
Our experts are ready to help
An expert matched to your unique needs will file for you and get your best tax outcome possible.
Getting started is easy
First, match with an expert
Get matched with a dedicated expert who knows your situation—and handles taxes your way, in person or online.
See your price upfront
Switch to Expert Full Service and let an expert handle your taxes for just $150—including all tax forms.
Hand off to your expert
Upload your docs, then your expert takes it from there. Hop on a welcome call for extra support.
Get support on your schedule
We’re not your 9-to-5 tax shop. Connect with your expert even on nights and weekends during tax season. Track their progress and see them finish as soon as January 6.
They file. You get every dollar you deserve.
When your return is finished, your expert will walk you through the details and answer any questions. They’ll file for you with 100% accuracy and audit support, guaranteed.
Keep your expert next year
The best part? You can choose to work with the same expert again—someone who already knows you and your taxes.
Read why our customers love TurboTax Expert Full Service

Get your taxes done right and your biggest tax refund—guaranteed
Your tax return, backed for lifeTM
100% accurate calculations, audit support, and your max refund. All backed for the full 7-year life of your tax return.
Your best tax outcome
Whether you file yourself or get expert help, you’ll get your maximum refund guaranteed, or your money back.
Taxes done right
TurboTax calculations are 100% accurate so your taxes will be done right, guaranteed, or we'll pay you any IRS penalties.
Frequently asked questions
Learn more about each way of doing your taxes
What are the differences between TurboTax Expert Assist and TurboTax Expert Full Service?
With Expert Full Service, you’re matched to a dedicated tax expert who will do your taxes, start to finish, and review them with you before filing. Where available, you will have the option to work with a local expert in person. You may see this option after starting with Expert Full Service if it’s available in your area.
With Expert Assist, a team of tax experts is available to provide you with unlimited answers and advice as you do your taxes, and can review your return before you file.
When is my tax expert available?
After you’re matched with your dedicated Expert Full Service tax expert, they’ll share the hours they’re available. If you need help when your Expert Full Service tax expert is unavailable, you can reach our other Expert Full Service experts 7 days a week from 5 AM to 9 PM PT from January 5 to April 20, 2026. Outside of tax season, our experts are available Monday-Friday from 5 AM through 5 PM PT.
How do I communicate with my tax expert?
